title: India must cut fertiliser import dependence, leverage AI and precision tech: ICAR chief
description: India is seeking self-reliance in fertilizers. Experts propose a multi-pronged approach using artificial intelligence and precision nutrient management. This strategy aims to reduce import dependence and optimize fertilizer use. Initiatives like the Soil Health Card scheme will be strengthened. A mission mode program will promote organic manures to replace mineral fertilizers.
content:

title: Oracle agrees to buy power from Bloom for AI data centers
description: Oracle Corp. agreed to purchase as much as 2.8 gigawatts of fuel-cell power from Bloom Energy Corp. to supply data centers for artificial intelligence work.
content:
By Brody Ford and Naureen S. Malik, Bloomberg
Oracle Corp. agreed to purchase as much as 2.8 gigawatts of fuel-cell power from Bloom Energy Corp. to supply data centers for artificial intelligence work.
An initial 1.2 gigawatts of capacity has alread... [2282 chars]

title: Apple's AI chief John Giannandrea officially leaving Apple after 8 years
description: Apple's artificial intelligence chief John Giannandrea is expected to leave the company after eight years, according to media reports.
content: John Giannandrea, Apple’s long-time head of artificial intelligence, is leaving the company this week, marking the end of his role during a period shaped by delays and mixed results in AI development, including the rollout of Apple Intelligence and p... [903 chars]

title: Nissan to trim global car lineup, boost use of AI driving tech
description: YOKOHAMA, Japan — Nissan Motor plans to streamline its global automobile lineup by exiting low-performing ones and deploy its artificial intelligence driving technology across 90 percent of its array over the long term as it targets a revitalization after years of turmoil.
content: YOKOHAMA, Japan — Nissan Motor plans to streamline its global automobile lineup by exiting low-performing ones and deploy its artificial intelligence driving technology across 90 percent of its array over the long term as it targets a revitalization ... [2569 chars]

title: China's EV makers accelerate push into chips, AI amid global cooperation
description: BEIJING — Chinese automakers are speeding up efforts to integrate batteries, chips and artificial intelligence (AI), as competition shifts from scale expansion to higher-value innovation, industry executives and experts said at an intelligent electric vehicle (EV) development forum held in Beijing.

title: IMF Urges Nations to Stay at Frontier of Mounting AI Risks
description: Governments and regulators must “stay at the frontier” of rising threats from artificial intelligence, a top official at the International Monetary Fund warned on Tuesday, as fears about the destructive potential of Anthropic PBC’s new models dominated conversations at the fund’s Spring Meetings.
content: Governments and regulators must “stay at the frontier” of rising threats from artificial intelligence, a top official at the International Monetary Fund warned on Tuesday, as fears about the destructive potential of Anthropic PBC’s new models dominat... [400 chars]

title: CEOs are betting AI will augment work rather than displace all workers
description: Panelists at the Semafor World Economy conference said artificial intelligence can supplement the work that's already done, improving its quantity and quality.
content: The effect artificial intelligence will have on the labor market has left workers and job seekers alike worried about their future. Top executives, however, are optimistic that the technology can continue to augment workloads rather than entirely dis... [3347 chars]
